stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 11, what are the three basic types of Air Traffic Services?

options.a: Air traffic control service, flight information service, and alerting service.
options.b: Area control service, alerting service, and aeronautical information service.
options.c: Air traffic control service, flight information service, and advisory service.
options.d: Area control service, approach control service, and aerodrome control service.
